title: Tingulonga melilonis
constituents: Tingulonga melilonis is not a recognized species of plant. However, it is possible that you are referring to the plant Melilotus melilotus, also known as sweet clover. Melilotus melilotus contains a variety of active constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. These compounds have been reported to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the composition and potential benefits of Tingulonga melilonis.
